mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.farmer_id, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.stock, p.category, p.images, p.status, p.created_at, fp.name AS farmer_name, fp.user_id AS farmer_user_id FROM products p JOIN farmer_profiles fp ON fp.id = p.farmer_id WHERE p.id = #{id}
SELECT id, farmer_id, name, description, price, stock, category, images, status, created_at FROM products WHERE farmer_id = #{farmerId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (farmer_id, name, description, price, stock, category, images, status) VALUES (#{farmerId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{category}, #{images}::jsonb, #{status}) RETURNING id, farmer_id, name, description, price, stock, category, images, status, created_at
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET name = COALESCE(#{name}, name), description = COALESCE(#{description}, description), price = COALESCE(#{price}, price), stock = COALESCE(#{stock}, stock), category = COALESCE(#{category}, category), images = COALESCE(#{images}::jsonb, images), status = COALESCE(#{status}, status) WHERE id = #{id} AND farmer_id = #{farmerId} RETURNING id, farmer_id, name, description, price, stock, category, images, status, created_at
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM products WHERE id = #{id} AND farmer_id = #{farmerId}
